name: File and Directory Discovery Enumeration
description: Detects extensive file and directory enumeration indicative of data hunting
query:
// Detect extensive file enumeration
// Trigger on recursive directory listing with search patterns
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(dir\s+/s|find\s+/|ls\s+-[lRa]|tree\s+/f|Get-ChildItem.*-Recurse)"
  and cmdline matches "(?i)(password|credential|secret|key|config|backup|\.doc|\.xls|\.pdf|\.kdbx)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 2
within 120 seconds
